text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as we're walking through the shopping
district on the way home...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Geez, that's loud...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I received a raffle ticket earlier when I bought
something, which is perfect because...
choice_data_list: We gotta give this a try, Taishin!
We gotta give this a try, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you just do it yourself? I'm gonna head
home.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Those things are always rigged so you don't
actually win anything.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That grand prize is nothing but a pipe dream.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Oho! I see you've got your eyes on the grand
prize, miss! That's the spirit! Dream big or go
home!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I wasn't even—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh! Shut your piehole, dummy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin spins the lever of the raffle
machine with a somewhat puckered expression.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Seriously?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I actually won the hot spring trip?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh, thanks...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin is so surprised that all she can
manage is a genuine show of gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Here. This belongs to you since it was your raffle
ticket.
choice_data_list:
But you're the one who won the prize. You
should get to enjoy it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Fine.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ah, so that's why you're asking which of us would
like to join you on a trip.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oooh, wow! A trip to a hot spring? I'd love to—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Now, hold on, Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Bwah?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You really need to be more sensitive to your friends'
feelings.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My apologies, Taishin. The two of us will be busy
for the foreseeable future, so I'm afraid we can't
go with you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There's much to do after the Twinkle Series as
well.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I'm sure there's someone who would
make a far more fitting travel companion.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: A what now? Who are you even talking about?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Which would be more embarrassing for you?
Having everyone spell it out or having to figure it
out yourself?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Nnngh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I hate it when you do that, Hayahide.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, do you? I love how awkward you are,
though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, Narita Taishin barges into my office, rushes
up to me, and shoves the vacation ticket into my
hands.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Shelve this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
If I can't find anyone to go with me by the
expiration date, then...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Then nothing! Anyway!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Just shelve it for now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how I end up holding onto the ticket
for the hot spring vacation.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Geez, it's enormous...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Right?! It's big enough to satisfy even the
hungriest Umamusume! And I know how much you
guys like to eat!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (This is way too much for me...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night, while I'm working in my office...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Good, you're here. You have dinner yet?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah? You better not tell me you don't like
Bolognese.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Pre-cooked hamburger steaks are just ground
meat once you smash them up... So, yeah.
choice_data_list:
You made this with that carrot hamburger
steak?!

You made this with that carrot hamburger
steak?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Is that a crime?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The raffle ticket was yours, so you should have a
share of this too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Anyway, hurry up and eat before it goes cold.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I couldn't bring myself to cut the hamburger
steak in half and share it all chummy-like, but
this... This, I can do.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we eat the special Bolognese pasta
that Taishin made, and it's absolutely delicious.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Holy crap, that's an insane amount of carrots.
What the hell am I supposed to do with all these?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I guess there's only one thing I can do.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoooaaa! I've never seen so many carrots!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I can understand how it would've been a struggle
for you two to finish this alone.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey! Are we really allowed to take as much
as we want?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but don't come crying to me if you eat too
many and get sick.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! It's carrot party tiiiime!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Of course you aren't listening...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: In any case, I'll happily take some as well.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This is actually a lifesaver. I was having trouble
thinking of side dishes to include in Brian's lunch.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I only won them because I used my trainer's raffle
ticket, so don't thank me.
choice_data_list:
But you were the one who suggested that we
share them, Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Taishin! I always knew you were super nice at heart!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ughhh, stop that! I'm not nice at all!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You looking to get punted into the sun?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our lucky raffle prize, we hold a delightful
carrot party together.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won third prize!
Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You heard 'em. Here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin tosses the carrot at me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That came from your raffle ticket, so it's yours.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, it's almost time for dinner, so let's go
home and—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grumble...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Can it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Not even! I'm not hungry, and I don't want the
carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gruuumble!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Urrrgh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I offer the carrot to Narita Taishin again, and she
snatches it from me without a word.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tissues...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's not like I care. It was your raffle ticket.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Besides, it's not like we can't go to a hot spring without winning some ticket at a raffle.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You being all sorry for me is what's making this
awkward.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Anyway, let's go home. You can have the tissues.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin rushes off, but her expression is
tinged with frustration as she brushes past me.
